purpose: Define the complete CASULO method as a computable operating cycle for GPT, POCs and technical validation.

phases.name: Colheita de Contexto
phases.purpose: capture briefing, sources, rules, evidence candidates and intent

phases.name: Arquitetura do Estado
phases.purpose: convert context into domain, entity, relation, state and risk

phases.name: Sinalização de Evidências
phases.purpose: map what is supported, missing, contradicted or assumed

phases.name: Unificação de Gates
phases.purpose: apply decision gates, blocked actions and required human review

phases.name: Leitura de Deltas
phases.purpose: measure gaps between current and target state

phases.name: Operação, Output e Observação
phases.purpose: produce controlled response, task, document, code, report or block
